info.title: PoYo AI - Seedance 2 Mini API
info.description: Fast video generation with Seedance 2 Mini

post.summary: Submit Seedance 2 Mini Video Generation Task
post.description: Generate videos using Seedance 2 Mini with text-to-video, first and last frame, and reference-to-video workflows.

input.prompt: Camera follows a man in black sprinting through a crowded street, a group chasing close behind. The shot cuts to a side tracking angle as he panics and crashes into a roadside fruit stall, scrambles to his feet, and keeps running. Sounds of a frantic crowd.

Begin with a clean studio product shot of pastel ice cream cones on a white surface, then transition into a warm coral studio setup where a person adjusts the umbrella beside a table. Keep the soft commercial lighting, playful pastel color palette, and smooth camera movement.

Create a new cinematic chase scene that follows the frantic street-running rhythm, fast camera cuts, and physical action pacing of the reference video. Keep the motion grounded and energetic, with crowd reactions and quick directional changes.

BearerAuth.description:
All API endpoints require Bearer Token authentication

Get your API Key:

Visit the [API Key Management Page](https://poyo.ai/dashboard/api-key) to get your API Key

Add it to the request header:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

callback_url.description: Webhook callback URL for result notifications. Use a publicly reachable endpoint that you control.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the target video.
prompt.example: Camera follows a man in black sprinting through a crowded street, a group chasing close behind. The shot cuts to a side tracking angle as he panics and crashes into a roadside fruit stall, scrambles to his feet, and keeps running. Sounds of a frantic crowd.

image_urls.description: Optional first and last frame images for image-to-video mode. Index 0 is the starting frame and index 1 is the optional ending frame. Cannot be used together with reference_*_urls fields.

reference_image_urls.description: Optional reference image URLs for reference-to-video mode. Cannot be used together with image_urls.

reference_video_urls.description: Reference videos to guide video generation. Refer to them in the prompt as @Video1, @Video2, etc. Supported formats: MP4, MOV. Up to 3 videos, combined duration must be between 2 and 15 seconds, total size under 50 MB. Each video must be between ~480p (640x640) and ~720p (834x1112) in resolution.

reference_audio_urls.description: Reference audio to guide video generation. Refer to them in the prompt as @Audio1, @Audio2, etc. Supported formats: MP3, WAV. Up to 3 files, combined duration must not exceed 15 seconds. Max 15 MB per file. If audio is provided, at least one reference image or video is required.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate an audio track.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. Supported values are integers from 4 to 15. Usage is billed by generated video duration.

task_id.description: Unique task identifier for status tracking

created_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was created
